sevenDay.synopsis: There's an area of IFR cigs to our W, but most of the LFA is VFR and will remain that way. For the PM, VFR skies will continue, but there is a chance of showers and ISOLD TS. Any TS activity that develops should be a see and avoid situation. We could be dealing with some fog first thing tomorrow AM and showers/ISOLD TS during the PM. Thursday looks all clear, but rain chances return for Friday PM. We'll keep rain chances in the forecast thru Sunday, at which time a frontal boundary will swoop in and finally clear things out.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 31 MAR - 06 APR
